query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.title, c.email, c.contactTrustTier, c.projectId, p.name as projectName FROM contacts c JOIN projects p ON c.projectId = p.id WHERE c.name IN ('Diego Linares', 'Troy Morris', 'John Sinagra', 'Paul Holland', 'Sam Leszczynski', 'Olga Machrone', 'Giuseppe Gulisano', 'Abe Ninan', 'Grant Hudson', 'Choi JungIn', 'Seth Strumph') LIMIT 15;
